whatsApp.noteText: The WhatsApp AI Assistant automatically processes incoming customer messages, consults on products and services, sends links and catalogs, and helps close sales 24/7. usragr.section1.title: Apofiz User Agreement
usragr.section1.p1: This User Agreement (hereinafter referred to as the Agreement) regulates the relations between the owner of Apofiz (hereinafter referred to as the Administration) and the User of the Site, including the Bank's Partner, the Courier Service and the Bank.
usragr.section1.p2: The site is not a mass media outlet.
usragr.section1.p3: By using the application and the website, you agree to the terms of this agreement.
usragr.section2.title: Terms and definitions
usragr.section2.li1.title: Apofiz
usragr.section2.li1.desc: is a Trade and social network, an Integration platform for the placement of goods and / or services of Users (Partners), a technical solution designed for the integration of software and hardware complexes, Partner's (organization's) provisions on Apofiz.
usragr.section2.li2.title: Bank
usragr.section2.li2.desc: a bank that provides services to a Partner (an organization on Apofiz) and a Buyer (an Apofiz User).
usragr.section2.li3.title: Order
usragr.section2.li3.desc: the provision by the Buyer of an instruction using a Means of Payment for the payment of Goods by non-cash or cash method.
usragr.section2.li4.title: A communication channel
usragr.section2.li4.desc: is one of the means of transmitting information: e-mail (email), postal communication, SMS message, fax, message on Apofiz, in a mobile application or other electronic form.
usragr.section2.li5.title: Courier service
usragr.section2.li5.desc: Courier delivery of inventory items to the consignee using courier services.
usragr.section2.li6.title: Courier delivery
usragr.section2.li6.desc: delivery of goods and / or services from the partner to the buyer by means of a courier service.
usragr.section2.li7.title: Personal Account
usragr.section2.li7.desc: is the information space of a Partner in his Organization on the Apofiz resource, allocated on Apofiz, a resource that is accessed by entering a username and password.
usragr.section2.li8.title: Partner
usragr.section2.li8.desc: Apofiz User (individual, legal entity/individual entrepreneur selling the Product/Services).
usragr.section2.li9.title: The Buyer
usragr.section2.li9.desc: is an individual who is a customer of the Bank and purchases Goods from a Partner.
usragr.section2.li10.title: QR code and / or user ID
usragr.section2.li10.desc: is a technology for providing access to the services of Apofiz, Partners, which allows identifying participants in purchases and sales of Goods/services, ensuring payment for Goods/services through the Bank, using data from the Apofiz resource, including the loyalty system and other Apofiz services.
usragr.section3.title: Subject of the agreement
usragr.section3.li1: The Administration grants the User the right to post the following information on the website and the application:
usragr.section3.li1.li4: Links to materials posted on other sites;
usragr.section3.li1.li5: Localization and placement on the map;
usragr.section3.li2: All information and data contained on Apofiz and its sections, including on the purchase of Goods, etc., are for informational purposes and are not a public offer.
usragr.section3.li3: The Partner's Personal Account is logged in according to the procedure defined on Apofiz and / or the mobile application.
usragr.section3.li4.li1: Carries out a marketing campaign (promotion of Partners);
usragr.section3.li4.li2: Places logos and information about the Partner on Apofiz, in the mobile application and advertising materials;
usragr.section3.li4.li3: Provides reporting within the Apofiz resource in the form and forms posted on Apofiz, in a mobile application. Performs data processing, provides the infrastructure for their placement;
usragr.section3.li4.li4: Provides the necessary information on Apofiz in the mobile application for the purposes of training the Partner's employees on the operation of the Apofiz Website and mobile application, including by QR code and / or user ID;
usragr.section3.li4.li5: Provides technical support and provides information about the work, Apofiz of the Website and mobile application;
usragr.section3.li4.li6: Organizes the possibility of access to a loan from Buyers for the purchase of Goods with the participation of the Bank.
usragr.section4.title: Rights and obligations of the Parties
usragr.section4.li1: The User has the right to:
usragr.section4.li1.li1: search for information on the Apofiz website and in the application;
usragr.section4.li1.li2: receive information on the Apofiz website and in the app;
usragr.section4.li1.li3: create information for the Apofiz website and application;
usragr.section4.li1.li4: distribute information on the Apofiz website and in the application;
usragr.section4.li1.li5: copy information to other sites with the source specified;
usragr.section4.li1.li6: use the site information for personal, non-commercial purposes;
usragr.section4.li1.li7: use the site information for commercial purposes with the permission of the copyright holders;
usragr.section4.li1.li9: post information about products and services;
usragr.section4.li2: The Administration has the right to:
usragr.section4.li2.li1: at its own discretion and if necessary, create, change, cancel Rules for partners;
usragr.section4.li2.li2: restrict access to any information on the website and in the application;
usragr.section4.li2.li5: refuse to register without explaining the reasons.
usragr.section4.li3.li1: ensure the accuracy of the information provided;
usragr.section4.li3.li2: ensure the safety of personal data from access by third parties;
usragr.section4.li3.li3: update the Personal Data provided during registration, if they change;
usragr.section4.li3.li4: not to disseminate information that is aimed at propaganda of war, inciting national, racial or religious hatred and enmity, as well as other information for the dissemination of which criminal or administrative responsibility is provided;
usragr.section4.li3.li5: do not disrupt the functionality of the site and application;
usragr.section4.li3.li6: do not perform actions aimed at misleading other Users;
usragr.section4.li3.li7: do not transfer your account and/or login and password of your account to third parties for use;
usragr.section4.li3.li8: do not post advertising, erotic, pornographic or offensive materials, as well as other information, the placement of which is prohibited or contradicts the norms of the current legislation;
usragr.section4.li3.li9: do not use scripts (programs) for automated collection of information and / or interaction with the Site and its Services.
usragr.section4.li4.li1: maintain the functionality of the site, except in cases when this is impossible for reasons beyond the control of the Administration;
usragr.section4.li4.li2: provide comprehensive protection of the User account;
usragr.section4.li4.li3: protect information whose dissemination is restricted or prohibited by laws by issuing a warning or deleting the account of a user who has violated the rules.
usragr.section4.li5: The Bank's Partner has the right to:
usragr.section4.li5.li1: Use the data of your organization, including changing the form, appearance, presentation of results, save them to a local medium in accordance with the functionality (capabilities) provided by Apofiz, in accordance with the terms of this agreement, as well as other documents posted for the Partner on Apofiz.
usragr.section4.li5.li2: Provide information about your participation on Apofiz when advertising and marketing promotion of the Partner organization, use the logo, means of individualization and other materials provided by Apofiz and/or the Bank for the purpose of marking your participation on Apofiz.
usragr.section4.li5.li4: Post information about the product and / or services on Apofiz in accordance with the terms of this agreement, as well as other documents posted for the Partner on Apofiz.
usragr.section4.li5.li5: Transfer its rights and obligations under this agreement to another person in whole or in part with the possibility of transferring full rights to the organization, but not without the right to release the Bank for its positions and obligations to the Bank.
usragr.section4.li6.li1: Comply with the requirements of Apofiz when placing, selling Goods through Apofiz or Partner outlets and selling Goods using the Bank's Payment Method.
usragr.section4.li6.li2: Comply with all the terms of this agreement and the documents posted on Apofiz, links to which are contained on Apofiz.
usragr.section4.li6.li3: In each retail outlet, place the Apofiz and/or Bank logo provided by Apofiz on the entrance doors (in their absence – in a place visible to Buyers), the cash zone, for the purpose of indicating their participation in Apofiz for Buyers.
usragr.section4.li6.li4: Comply with this agreement and other documents posted or signed with the Bank.
usragr.section4.li6.li5: Use the Buyer's personal data obtained under this agreement exclusively for the purposes of executing this agreement concluded by the Partner with the Buyer when placing an Order by the Buyer. Other use of personal data of Buyers is not allowed.
usragr.section4.li6.li6: To provide the opportunity for Buyers to purchase Goods through Apofiz and in all retail outlets, including newly opened ones.
usragr.section4.li6.li7: When opening a new or closing a partner organization, notify the Bank 5 days before the date of its opening/closing.
usragr.section4.li6.li8: Ensure that there is no difference in the cost of the same Product (including discounts, promotions) purchased using one of the Bank's Payment Methods compared to other payment methods, do not establish any other additional conditions or restrictions when the Buyer pays for Goods using one of the Bank's Payment Methods.
usragr.section4.li6.li9: Not to allow incorrect comparison of Services, Means of payment, with similar services, other subjects of Apofiz, including providing Customers with false information in any way.
usragr.section4.li6.li10: To provide, at the request of Apofiz / the Bank, all the necessary documents confirming the fact of the sale of the Goods to the Buyer.
usragr.section4.li6.li11: Timely pay for Services under the Agreement and penalties for violation of its terms concluded with the Bank.
usragr.section4.li6.li12: Not to copy in any way in any form, as well as to change, supplement, reproduce or distribute for any purpose the content (information, program code, etc.) of Apofiz, the Bank's Means of Payment in whole or in part.
usragr.section4.li6.li13: To carry out free storage of the Goods selected by the Buyer until the full payment of the cost of the Goods and the transfer of the Goods to the Buyer or until the expiration of the storage period of the reserved Goods according to the Agreement with the Bank.
usragr.section4.li6.li14: Not to transfer their rights and obligations under the Agreement to another person in whole or in part, as well as not to allow the transfer of powers to exercise / perform rights / obligations, and perform any other actions under the Agreement to persons who are not employees of the Partner, not to allow any other persons other than employees of the Partner to use their Personal Account, not to use the personal accounts of other Apofiz partners, and not to grant access to their Personal Account to a person who has access to the personal account of another partner on Apofiz.
usragr.section4.li6.li15: Ensure that you have access to the Internet on your side
usragr.section4.li6.li16: Provide the Bank with an order/consent for the withdrawal of money by the Bank from any Partner's bank accounts opened with the Bank, including by direct debit, for payment for Services on Apofiz, provided that the Bank's Integration Platform receives an appropriate confirmation in electronic form and/or if Apofiz presents other data confirming the provision of Services.
usragr.section4.li6.li17: Not to use in any form visual (graphic, text, audio, video and other) information, design, advertising and other materials, posters, stickers, banners, slogans developed, provided, used for promotion, advertising and other purposes within Apofiz for purposes not related to activities on Apofiz, promotions held within and/or participation of Apofiz and/or the Bank.
usragr.section4.li6.li18: If the Partner conducts or participates in any events, promotions not related to Apofiz, the Bank, do not use materials, information similar to the symbols (its design, color scheme, etc.) so much that it may mislead Buyers (Apofiz users) and other persons and create a false impression that these events are held within the framework of Apofiz and/or the organizers and/or participants of these events are Apofiz, the Bank.
usragr.section4.li6.li19: In case of disagreement with the terms of the promotion, changes in tariffs for Services, remove the Product from sale (remove information about the sold Product from Apofiz) for the period of such a promotion. Posting information about the Product on Apofiz (including refusal to withdraw from the sale of the Product) means acceptance of all the terms of the promotions, tariffs for Services and other changes or terms of this agreement. The Partner is responsible for the accuracy of information when publishing Products on Apofiz and product outlets about the assortment, prices, characteristics, availability of Goods offered by the Partner for purchase by Buyers and any information about the Product.
usragr.section4.li6.li20: If a Partner violates the terms of the Agreement, the Bank has the right, at its discretion, to apply the measures provided for in the Agreement to such a Partner.
usragr.section4.li7.li1: Transfer orders from customers to the courier service for delivery.
usragr.section4.li7.li2: Provide reliable information about your location and the location of your organization on Apofiz for transfer to the courier service for the delivery of goods and / or services for delivery.
usragr.section4.li7.li3: To carry out marketing promotion of the organization together with the courier service on Apofiz and beyond.
usragr.section4.li7.li4: Provide reliable information about the product and / or services on Apofiz in accordance with the terms of this agreement, for transfer to the courier service.
usragr.section4.li7.li5: Transfer receipts and the correct packaging of goods for subsequent logistics by means of a courier service.
usragr.section4.li8: The partner of the courier service undertakes:
usragr.section4.li8.li1: Comply with the requirements of the courier service.
usragr.section4.li8.li2: Transfer goods and/or services that are in good condition and in proper form for delivery by courier services.
usragr.section4.li8.li3: In each retail outlet, place advertising brochures or other advertising products provided by the courier service on the entrance doors (in their absence – in a place visible to Customers), the cash register area, provided by the courier service.
usragr.section4.li8.li4: Comply with this agreement and other documents posted or signed with the Courier Service.
usragr.section4.li8.li5: Use the Buyer's personal data obtained under this agreement exclusively for the purposes of executing this agreement concluded by the Partner with the Buyer when the Buyer places an Order for subsequent delivery with a Courier Service. Other use of personal data of Buyers is not allowed.
usragr.section4.li8.li6: To ensure the possibility of delivery of Goods by Buyers through Apofiz and in all retail outlets, including newly opened ones.
usragr.section4.li8.li7: When opening a new or closing a partner organization, notify the Partner Service 5 days before the date of its opening/closing.
usragr.section4.li8.li8: Ensure that there is no difference in the cost of the same Product (including discounts, promotions) purchased in the organization on Apofiz and transferred by the courier service for delivery to the buyer.
usragr.section4.li8.li9: To pay or transfer to the buyer information about the payment of courier services.

faq.subscription.title: Your subscriptions?
faq.subscription.desc: For easy navigation and search of your subscriptions, you can always use the subscriptions tab. By subscribing to organization, you will have access to all the hottest offers about discounts, in this organization and you will be able to receive notifications about new offers and various promotions. Be at the center of all the most interesting events of your subscriptions.
faq.savings.desc1: Buying or using services of organizations, you constantly save or earn real money. Depending on the conditions of the organizations, you can spend the saved funds. For your convenience, when changing the region, the currency will change depending on your location, you can also change the saved funds to another currency by yourself.
faq.savings.desc2: We often make purchases, we lose checks, we forget where we bought what product, and sometimes you remember that you bought cool thing and thinking how good it is to deliver this product again, but there are no contacts, and you have already forgotten the place, and the name of who sold even did not know. Now all this is in the past, in your statistics you will find all the information that interests you, the seller's name, location, address, contacts and of course the check itself ...
faq.savings.desc3: If you need to scan employee passes, you can do it in two ways. The first one is to enter the organization where you have the rights to scan the badges or the simpler option is to scan through the QR scanner on the profile page.
faq.savings.desc4: The list of your organizations was created for your convenience, when navigating and carrying out quick operations in them. Also, you can immediately identify the organizations in which you are the owner or an employee.
faq.roles.title: Create a position ?
faq.roles.desc: Each employee can have an individual position with the appointment of individual rights. When creating a new position, you need assign rights to a group of positions or individual employees. Let's look at an example, you want to assign an administrator for an employee to the position, but you do not want to transfer full rights to manage the organization, for this you can assign only those rights that will be available to the administrator position, and you can also individually configure rights for any position. Employee management is in your hands, motivate to raise positions, hire new employees, develop your business.
faq.roleRights.desc1: This function allows you to assign the rights of this position to scan the passes of employees in this organization. An employee with this position in the organization menu will have access to the badge scanner button.
faq.roleRights.desc2: This function allows you to assign the rights to this position, to view the statistics of sales and discounts, as well as to delete receipts of transactions made. The employee with this position in the organization menu will have access to the sale and discount button.
faq.roleRights.desc3: This function allows you to assign the rights to this position, for full editing of the organization. The following buttons will become available to the employee with this position in the organization menu: Edit, Manage discounts and change the background of discount cards.
faq.roleRights.desc4: This function allows you to assign the rights to this position, for discounts in the organization. An employee with this position will have access to the button Post discounts in the organization tool menu.
faq.roleRights.desc5: This function allows you to assign the rights of this position to send messages to all subscribers of the organization. An employee with this position will have access to the Send message to subscribers button in the organization tool menu.
faq.roleRights.desc6: This function allows you to assign the rights of a given position to manage the partners of the organization. An employee with this position will have access to the Partner Management button in the organization tool menu.
faq.registration.title1: Why is important to add a photo ?
faq.registration.desc1: Your photo is required to identify you. Many organizations require your photo, because if you did not take the device for a discount or a pass to work, you can simply say your QR code number and you will be identified.
faq.registration.desc2: It all depends of requirements that each organization can set as discretion. For example, you buy an expensive item in a company store, you have a check, and you decided to refuse what you bought, in this case you may be asked to infect your name, according to your identity document, which must match the data of the electronic check. Also it will use for a pass to work.
faq.registration.desc3: For your convenience, suppose you subscribed to an organization or just want to hide data in open sources of the resource, we have provided the ability to display your name or nickname.
faq.registration.desc4: Mail is needed for your safety and password recovery, in case you lose your authorization number or change the country where SMS with a code may not come to confirm your identity.
faq.refund.freedomPay: Documentation and Agreement for the FREEDOM Pay KG Offer
faq.refund.title1: Return of goods or services at Apofiz.com
faq.refund.desc1: The trade-social network Apofiz, hereinafter referred to as the Electronic Platform, acts solely as an intermediary platform and is not a party to any transactions between users. The Electronic Platform is not a seller, manufacturer, or supplier of goods and/or services presented on the organization pages on the platform. Therefore, the Electronic Platform does not assume legal responsibility for the quality and warranty of the offered goods or services, as well as for possible violations of the rights and obligations of the parties during the transaction. All questions, disputes, and claims related to the fulfillment, termination, or non-fulfillment of the terms of the purchase and sale agreement should be addressed directly to the participants of the transaction. The Electronic Platform disclaims all direct or indirect obligations and warranties regarding any goods or services offered on the platform and does not undertake commitments to resolve conflicts between users.
faq.refund.desc2: Returning items purchased online is regulated by the laws of a specific country and the return policy of a particular store or seller. However, there is a general list of items that are usually excluded from the possibility of return after online purchase:
faq.refund.p1: 1. **Personal hygiene items**: Toothbrushes, combs, cotton swabs, etc.
faq.refund.p2: 2. **Cosmetics and perfumes**: Opened and used products.
faq.refund.p4: 4. **Underwear and swimwear**: Especially if the factory packaging or labels are compromised.
faq.refund.p5: 5. **Food and beverages**: Including supplements and vitamins.
faq.refund.p7: 7. **Audio and video recordings, software**: If the packaging has been opened.
faq.refund.p11: 11. **Tickets for events, airline tickets, and reservations**.
faq.refund.p12: 12. **Digital goods and services**: E-books, online courses, license keys, etc.
faq.refund.p13: 13. **High-value jewelry, watches, and precious stones**: In some stores.
faq.refund.p14: 14. **Discounted or final sale items**: Marked as "final sale" or "non-returnable".
faq.refund.p15: In addition to the above, many stores may have their own specifics in the return policy. It is always recommended to review the return policy before making a purchase, especially when shopping online.
faq.partners.desc1: You can invite or become a partner of any organization. Each partner has the ability to set up rights to manage, edit, conduct employee passes or obtain statistics for your organization.
faq.partners.desc2: Great question, let's take an example. You have a chain of restaurants, you are the owner of this chain, it is not convenient for you to check all branches, going to each of them, so you can get confused. On the page of your organizations, you can enter partners and view their statistics, view employee statistics, and of course view the sales statistics of your affiliates.
faq.partners.title3: What are the benefits of being partners ?
faq.partners.desc3: Affiliate networks have the opportunity to increase profits by increasing the traffic of new customers, while saving on promoting their new or little-recognized affiliates. Let's take an example. You have a network of branded stores in different shopping centers and just separate premises. Having created a network of partners, you can send advertising push notifications to all subscribers, all partners, about new branches and individual offers. Yes, we almost forgot you have the opportunity to create ad buyers that will promote your network, and each user will see your ad and become your subscriber, without additional advertising costs
faq.partners.title4: Can other organizations be partners of your organization ?
faq.partners.desc4: Of course, this is also very convenient. Let's take an example. You have a business center, and you have been thinking for a long time to make an electronic access system for everyone who works in your Business Center. No problem, you don't have to pay for it and install complex pass systems. You can make an affiliate network with all employees and tenants in your Business Center. Each tenant in the settings will give the right to guide employees through you, you will have to give the rights to your security personnel or other employees to conduct passes of your partners' employees. And now all of you get statistics of visits of all employees in your Business Center. Your partners can also see the attendance of their employees, while not spending extra costs on installing additional equipment or staff who is responsible for attendance.
faq.partnerRights.desc1: It will be possible for your partner to scan the passes of your employees. Consider an example, your organization is located in a business center, which is your partner, the security of the business center at the entrance will be able to scan the passes of your employees, and you will have access to the entire history of visits by your staff. Use this system ....
faq.partnerRights.desc2: Your partner will be able to view the statistics of sales and discounts, as well as delete checks of transactions. This function allows you to manage your network business and control all your organizations at once. For example, you are the owner of a restaurant chain, by going to any organization in your network, you can view the available statistics, and monitor the profitability of your business. Take advantage of the convenient function of your network ...
faq.partnerRights.desc3: Your partner will be able to edit your organization. After enabling this feature, your partner will have all the rights to change your organization and will be able to fully administer it. It will become possible to edit the organization, change and add discounts, manage partners, send messages from your organization. Consider an example, you are the owner of a hotel chain, you need to make permanent changes to your discount cards or change data in the description of your business, using this function you can, by giving the administrator rights to make changes in all your organizations, and it will be convenient for you to monitor all the changes and continue control your organizations not advanced full access to them ...
faq.partnerRights.desc4: This function combines fixed discounts of organizations and summarizes their accumulations together with your partner. Consider an example, you have a chain of branded stores, and you need to combine your fixed discounts across your entire network. After enabling this function, your customers will be able to buy goods and accumulate funds for a fixed discount of your affiliate network. This function will become available only when enabled on both sides of partners.
faq.partnerRights.desc5: This function combines cashback discounts of organizations and summarizes their accumulations together with your partner. Consider an example, you have a network of gas stations, and you need to combine cashback discounts across your entire network. After enabling this function, your customers will be able to buy goods and accumulate cashback funds and pay with them in your partner network. This function will become available only when enabled on both sides of partners.
faq.owner.title: Appoint an owner ?
faq.owner.desc: Now you do not need to change the phone number or come up with complex schemes for transferring the rights of your organization, for this you just need to enter the id number of the qr code or scan the user and appoint a new owner of the organization by confirming in the notification. After the appointment of a new owner, all information about the organization's activities, statistics and complete administration are transferred to the new owner. The old owner will lose the ability to manage or see the statistics of the transferred organization. This function is intended to transfer full rights to the organization to a new owner.
faq.organization.title: Why you need open organization ?
faq.organization.desc: You will be surprised, but there are no other platforms in the world where everyone can become the owner of their organization, starting to provide discounts, bonuses, keep electronic records and control of staff activities, send informational messages to their subscribers and customers, and even more. And if you remember how expensive it is to open your own, not that making it available on IOS and Android. Apofiz opens all these opportunities for you to increase sales and awareness of your organization.

faq.offlinePurchase.p4: If a size is specified, choose it and add to the cart.

faq.offlinePurchase.p12: If you choose self-pickup, payment will be made at the organization's specified address upon receipt of the product.

faq.offlinePurchase.p16: Representatives from the organization or the courier service will get in touch with you to clarify any details if necessary
faq.koverSamolet.tariffsAndConditions: Tariffs and conditions of Kover Samolet
faq.koverSamolet.title: Terms from Apofiz for Kover Samolet
faq.koverSamolet.desc: The rules for returning food may vary depending on the specific store or restaurant. The delivery service "Kover Samolet" acts as a courier and is not responsible for the quality of the products provided by the organization that supplied the goods. The return rules of organizations for food and other goods may include the following:
faq.koverSamolet.p1: 1. **Opening of Packaging**: After opening the packaging or consuming the product, returns may be limited or impossible due to sanitary and hygienic reasons.
faq.koverSamolet.p2: 2. **Return Periods**: In most cases, if you have an issue with the product, you must contact the store or restaurant within a certain time after receiving the order.
faq.koverSamolet.p3: 3. **Product Quality**: If the product does not meet the declared quality standards or is damaged, you may be eligible for a refund or replacement.
faq.koverSamolet.p4: 4. **Contacting Customer Support**: In case of issues with the ordered product, it is usually recommended to contact the customer support of the store or restaurant to clarify return options.
faq.koverSamolet.p5: 5. **Return Conditions**: Stores and restaurants often specify specific conditions under which returns are possible, such as preserving the original packaging or providing evidence of an issue with the product.
faq.koverSamolet.p6: 6. **Prohibition on Returning Certain Items**: Some products, especially those prone to spoilage, may be excluded from the possibility of return.
faq.koverSamolet.p7: It is important to read the rules and conditions of the store or restaurant before placing an order to be aware of their return policy.
faq.freedomPay.title1: Contract of Offer from FREEDOM Pay KG
faq.freedomPay.desc1: This offer agreement comes into effect when a transaction is processed through the payment system of the specified partner below and is valid only within the territory of the Kyrgyz Republic. The refund mentioned in Appendix No. 1 to the Public Contract for Paid Services, 'Payment and Refund Rules,' comes into effect only after mutual agreement between the Performer and the Consumer.
faq.freedomPay.p1: Appendix No. 1 to the Public Contract for Paid Services.
faq.freedomPay.desc2: The present Payment and Refund Rules (hereinafter - the Rules) govern the relationship between the Performer and the Customer related to the payment for services under the Agreement and the refund of the paid service cost in the event of early termination of the Agreement. The trade-social network Apofiz, hereinafter referred to as the Electronic Platform, is not responsible for the delivered goods or services, and the refund is processed on the Performer's side.
faq.employees.title: Invite an employee ?
faq.employees.desc: By inviting an employee, you find a job for him. To do this, you need to enter the id number of the employee's QR code or scan it. After that, you will be able to assign a position to an employee and give him the rights to administer your organization. You can also view sales statistics, attendance schedule, change position and rights at any time. You can also transfer the ownership of the organization to another user. All statistics are available 24 hours 7 days a week, run your business online.
faq.cards.desc1: Create promotional cards on sales or special days like Black Friday. All users and of course your subscribers will receive notifications of your promotions. Create a queue for your goods and services. Promotional cards work wonders.
faq.cards.desc2: Of course, it was so with everyone. The client bought a lot and received a permanent discount from you. I came back for new goods, but the new seller does not know him and refuses to hold a discount, it's good if you went broke and issued a discount card, but what if the client forgot it. Now this is all in the past, the client does not even need to show the QR code that is tied to his phone, just say the ID number that is tied to the application. All you have to do is hold a discount and the client will definitely return for new purchases.
faq.cards.desc3: This is the most important and, at the same time, the most necessary card if you want to set up a constant flow of customers. Only those organizations that have the means to create an application can boast of cashback. Now it is available to everyone. Cashback card gives you the opportunity to accumulate money in order to pay off with it at the next purchase. Imagine you bought a lot of goods or services, and the next time you can pay using the accumulated cashback and pay them in whole or in part for your purchase. Everyone who at least once uses this type of savings will definitely come back to you again and again. Now imagine you have a network of organizations, a client will be able to use cashback in any of them, and analytics will be available to you. The line of customers is in your hands ...

payment.paymentSystemInfo.p1: Payment systems integrated with Visa, MasterCard, and cryptocurrencies play a key role in ensuring secure and convenient payment transactions.
payment.paymentSystemInfo.ul1.li1: Payment systems integrated with Visa, MasterCard, and cryptocurrencies allow customers to quickly and conveniently make payments for your goods and services.
payment.paymentSystemInfo.ul1.li2: Customers can use their credit/debit cards or cryptocurrency wallets for quick and secure purchase completion, without the need to enter additional data or payment card information on-site.
payment.paymentSystemInfo.ul1.li3: You no longer have to worry about keeping a daily cashbook, as all data will be automatically saved in your statistics.
payment.paymentSystemInfo.ul1.li4: All cash operations can be tracked in your personal account.
payment.paymentSystemSettings.p1: If this setting is turned off, payment through this payment system will not be available to customers
payment.generalSettings.title: General Payment Systems Settings
payment.connection.p1: First and foremost, you need to go through business identification and confirm ownership of a bank account. Remember, if you are using an Apofiz account for your business, you will likely need to verify the owner's identity. You will also need to confirm the ownership of the bank account, the physical location of the business, and ownership of your organization's page on Apofiz. If your organization is verified and has a check mark, the identification process will be expedited. Additional information may also be requested from you via email.
payment.connection.p2: The review will touch on the accuracy of your products and services descriptions — this minimizes possible confusion and prevents erroneous chargebacks.
payment.connection.p3: Also, Apofiz is not responsible for incorrectly provided goods and services. In case of complaints or numerous errors, the payment service may be temporarily or permanently blocked
payment.generalSettings.p1: If this setting is turned off, all payment systems will not be available to customers
payment.generalSettings.p2: This setting is activated by default to organizations with connected payment systems
payment.generalSettings.p3: If your organization accepts payments after confirming that the goods or services are in stock and available to the customer, it carries a minimal risk of refund and payment cancellation, which in turn does not entail additional costs for refunding money to the customer through the payment system.
payment.generalSettings.p4: By turning off this setting, you take full responsibility for refunding payments to customers and must independently notify your clients about it
payment.generalSettings.p5: The resource is not responsible for the return of transactions paid for without confirmation of the goods or services on the side of the supplier of goods or services of this organization.
payment.generalSettings.p6: The customer will be informed about this condition when purchasing a product or service during online payment
